no_policy.interpretation: Storage primarily COMPLEMENTS EaaS solar: both grow together as H_d increases. The dominant operational bottleneck is H_d (power throughput).

ndc3_unconditional.interpretation: Storage primarily SUBSTITUTES for EaaS solar: higher H_d reduces EaaS solar requirements. Dominant bottleneck: H_d (power throughput).

parameter_sensitivity.interpretation: surplus_frac has greater influence — the solar-storage coupling intensity (integration quality) matters more than dispatch hours.
